sarif_upload.notes: validated-findings.json reports no GitHub ingest artifacts; no per-finding GitHub code scanning URLs were present.

fixes.fix_rationale: Upgrades the reachable HTML sanitizer from the vulnerable 1.x release to a maintained 2.x release without changing call sites.
fixes.functionality_preservation: Feedback continues to pass through insecurity.sanitizeHtml(comment); only the library implementation is updated.

validation.notes: Dependency version validation passed with sanitize-html@2.17.0. Full npm test could not run because frontend Angular CLI 'ng' was not found in this workspace.

fixes.residual_risk: Admin UI [innerHTML] usage remains a defense-in-depth concern until reviewed with product UX requirements.

changed_code.snippet: models.sequelize.query('SELECT * FROM Users WHERE email = ? AND password = ? AND deletedAt IS NULL', { replacements: [req.body.email || '', insecurity.hash(req.body.password || '')], model: models.User, plain: true })

fixes.fix_rationale: Parameterized replacements keep email and password hash values out of SQL syntax.
fixes.functionality_preservation: Login response shape, TOTP flow, challenge checks, and basket creation are unchanged.

validation.notes: Syntax check passed. Full npm test failed before tests because 'ng' was not found.

fixes.residual_risk: MD5 password hashing remains deferred under VULN-010.

vulnerable_code.snippet: models.sequelize.query('SELECT * FROM Products WHERE ((name LIKE \'%' + criteria + '%\' OR description LIKE \'%' + criteria + '%\') ...')

changed_code.snippet: models.sequelize.query('SELECT * FROM Products WHERE ((name LIKE ? ESCAPE ... OR description LIKE ? ESCAPE ...) ...', { replacements: [escapedCriteria, escapedCriteria] })

fixes.fix_rationale: Binds search terms as data and escapes LIKE wildcards before matching.
fixes.functionality_preservation: Search still performs substring matching across product name and description with the same 200-character limit and response shape.

validation.notes: Syntax check passed. Full npm test failed before tests because 'ng' was not found.

fixes.residual_risk: None identified for SQL injection in this route.

fixes.fix_rationale: Removes JavaScript $where evaluation for user-controlled path input.
fixes.functionality_preservation: Order tracking still looks up the decoded order id and returns the same fallback object when no order is found.

validation.notes: Syntax check passed. Full npm test failed before tests because 'ng' was not found.

fixes.residual_risk: None identified for this injection sink.

changed_code.snippet: const productId = Number(id); if (!Number.isInteger(productId)) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Wrong Params' }); db.reviews.find({ product: productId })

fixes.fix_rationale: Converts the path id to a typed integer and uses structured equality instead of JavaScript evaluation.
fixes.functionality_preservation: Valid numeric product review requests return the same JSON shape and liked flag behavior; invalid ids get the existing Wrong Params error.

validation.notes: Syntax check passed. Full npm test failed before tests because 'ng' was not found.

fixes.residual_risk: None identified for this injection sink.

vulnerable_code.snippet: libxml.parseXml(data, { noblanks: true, noent: true, nocdata: true }); ... + utils.trunc(xmlString, 200) ... + err.message

changed_code.snippet: libxml.parseXml(data, { noblanks: true, noent: false, nonet: true, nocdata: true }); ... generic deprecated upload error

fixes.fix_rationale: Disables entity substitution/network entity loading and stops returning parsed XML or parser internals to clients.
fixes.functionality_preservation: XML uploads still reach the existing deprecated 410 flow; the response no longer echoes attacker-controlled XML or parser messages.

validation.notes: Syntax check passed. Full npm test failed before tests because 'ng' was not found.

fixes.residual_risk: XML upload support remains deprecated and should be removed after product approval.

changed_code.snippet: const uploadRoot = path.resolve('uploads/complaints'); const absolutePath = path.resolve(uploadRoot, fileName); if (absolutePath.startsWith(uploadRoot + path.sep) && !path.isAbsolute(fileName)) entry.pipe(fs.createWriteStream(absolutePath))

fixes.fix_rationale: Canonicalizes each ZIP entry under the intended upload directory and rejects paths that escape that root.
fixes.functionality_preservation: Safe ZIP entries still extract to uploads/complaints; traversal entries are ignored.

validation.notes: Syntax check passed. Full npm test failed before tests because 'ng' was not found.

fixes.residual_risk: Archive size/file-count limits remain a future hardening item.

vulnerable_code.snippet: if (username.match(/#\{(.*)\}/) !== null) { const code = username.substring(2, username.length - 1); eval(code) }

fixes.fix_rationale: Removes server-side eval of profile data and treats usernames purely as template data.
fixes.functionality_preservation: Profile rendering and escaping behavior for usernames is preserved; only code execution side effects are removed.

validation.notes: Syntax check passed. Full npm test failed before tests because 'ng' was not found.

fixes.residual_risk: None identified for this eval sink.

fixes.fix_rationale: Removes Angular trust bypass and sanitizes product HTML before binding.
fixes.functionality_preservation: Product descriptions still render as HTML where Angular allows it; unsafe scriptable content is stripped.

validation.notes: Full npm test failed before frontend tests because 'ng' was not found.

fixes.residual_risk: Product mutation authorization remains deferred under VULN-011.

fixes.vulnerability_id: VULN-005, DEP-001, DEP-002, VULN-008, VULN-009, VULN-010, VULN-011, VULN-012

vulnerable_code.snippet: B2B eval, JWT library/key/hash migration, SSRF URL fetch, public directory listings, generated product APIs, and basket ownership checks

fixes.fix_rationale: These fixes require product/security decisions such as accepted B2B order format, key rotation and password migration, outbound image host allowlist, sensitive file access model, admin/RBAC policy, and basket/order ownership semantics.
fixes.functionality_preservation: Deferred rather than changing public routes, authentication state, stored credential format, data visibility, or generated API behavior without owner approval.

validation.notes: No code changes made for deferred findings.

fixes.residual_risk: Findings remain exploitable until product decisions are made and implemented.
